title: N'amiq
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''N'amiqs''' were [[Bird/Legends|avian]] [[Reptile/Legends|reptiles]] used by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Warrior caste]] to teach young Warriors how to fight.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Final Prophecy]]'' {{Mo}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
